name_cn:
Model: 499623 Black
Size: 25x14x8cm
Gucci Dionysus Diamond-Clasp
True fan favorite, absolutely stunning.
Preserves the perfect lineage of the Dionysus bag,
but ushers in a new era of Dionysus leather!
The most valuable part of the bag is the tiger head diamond clasp.
A treasure item. Not a market item.
Very light, perfect size, highly recommended.
